symbols.name: Factory
symbols.summary: Provides methods to create instances of specified types using reflection.

symbols.name: Create(Type, params object[])
symbols.summary: Creates an instance of the specified type using the constructor that best matches the specified parameters.

syntax.content: public static object Create(Type type, params object[] parameters)

parameters.description: The type of object to create.
An array of arguments that match the parameters of the constructor to invoke.

returns.description: An instance of the specified type, or null if no matching constructor is found.

parameters.description: The type of object to create.
An array of arguments that match the parameters of the constructor to invoke.

returns.description: An instance of the specified type, or null if no matching constructor is found.

symbols.name: Create(Type, params object[])
symbols.summary: Creates an instance of type T by calling its parameterless constructor.

syntax.content: public static T Create(Type type, params object[] parameters) where T : class

returns.description: An instance of type T.
An instance of type T.

symbols.name: Create(params object[])
symbols.summary: Creates an instance of the specified type using the constructor that best matches the specified parameters.

syntax.content: public static T Create(params object[] parameters) where T : class

parameters.description: An array of arguments that match the parameters of the constructor to invoke.

returns.description: An instance of the specified type, or null if no matching constructor is found.

parameters.description: An array of arguments that match the parameters of the constructor to invoke.

returns.description: An instance of the specified type, or null if no matching constructor is found.

symbols.name: Create(Type, Type, params object[])
symbols.summary: Creates an instance of the specified generic type using the specified genericType and constructor parameters.

syntax.content: public static object Create(Type type, Type genericType, params object[] parameters)

parameters.description: The type of the object to create.
The generic type to be used for creating the instance.
An array of arguments that match the parameters of the constructor to invoke.

returns.description: An instance of the specified generic type, or null if no matching constructor is found.

parameters.description: The type of the object to create.
The generic type to be used for creating the instance.
An array of arguments that match the parameters of the constructor to invoke.

returns.description: An instance of the specified generic type, or null if no matching constructor is found.

symbols.name: Create(Type, Type, params object[])
symbols.summary: Creates an instance of the specified generic type using the provided constructor parameters.

syntax.content: public static T Create(Type type, Type genericType, params object[] parameters) where T : class

parameters.description: The generic type definition of the object to create.
The specific type to use as the generic argument.
The parameters to pass to the constructor.

returns.description: An instance of the specified generic type.

parameters.description: The generic type definition of the object to create.
The specific type to use as the generic argument.
The parameters to pass to the constructor.

returns.description: An instance of the specified generic type.

symbols.name: Create(Type, IDictionary, params object[])
symbols.summary: Creates an instance of the specified type type using the constructor that best matches the specified parameters and sets the properties defined in propertyItems.

syntax.content: public static object Create(Type type, IDictionary propertyItems, params object[] parameters)

parameters.description: The type of the object to create.
A dictionary containing property names and values to be set on the created instance.
An array of parameters to pass to the constructor of the type.

returns.description: An instance of the specified type, or null if the creation fails.

parameters.description: The type of the object to create.
A dictionary containing property names and values to be set on the created instance.
An array of parameters to pass to the constructor of the type.

returns.description: An instance of the specified type, or null if the creation fails.

symbols.name: Create(Type, IDictionary, params object[])
symbols.summary: Creates an instance of the specified type using the constructor that best matches the specified parameters and initializes it with the values specified in propertyItems.

syntax.content: public static T Create(Type type, IDictionary propertyItems, params object[] parameters) where T : class

parameters.description: The type of object to create.
A dictionary containing property names and values to set on the created instance.
An array of arguments that match the parameters of the constructor to invoke.

returns.description: An instance of type T initialized with the specified property values, or null if no matching constructor is found.

parameters.description: The type of object to create.
A dictionary containing property names and values to set on the created instance.
An array of arguments that match the parameters of the constructor to invoke.

returns.description: An instance of type T initialized with the specified property values, or null if no matching constructor is found.

symbols.name: Create(Type, IServiceProvider)
symbols.summary: Creates an instance of the specified type using the service provider to get instances for the constructor.

syntax.content: public static object Create(Type type, IServiceProvider serviceProvider)

parameters.description: The type of the instance to create.
The service provider to resolve dependencies.

returns.description: An object of the specified type.

parameters.description: The type of the instance to create.
The service provider to resolve dependencies.

returns.description: An object of the specified type.

symbols.name: Create(Type, IServiceProvider)
symbols.summary: Creates an instance of the specified type using the service provider to get instances for the constructor.

syntax.content: public static T Create(Type type, IServiceProvider serviceProvider) where T : class

parameters.description: The type of the instance to create.
The service provider to resolve dependencies.

returns.description: An instance of the specified type, or null if the instance could not be created.

parameters.description: The type of the instance to create.
The service provider to resolve dependencies.

returns.description: An instance of the specified type, or null if the instance could not be created.

symbols.name: Create(Type, IDictionary, IServiceProvider)
symbols.summary: Creates an instance of the specified type using the provided service provider and sets the properties from the given dictionary.

syntax.content: public static object Create(Type type, IDictionary propertyItems, IServiceProvider serviceProvider)

parameters.description: The type of the object to create.
A dictionary containing property names and their values to set on the created instance.
The service provider used to resolve dependencies for the constructor.

returns.description: An instance of the specified type with properties set.

parameters.description: The type of the object to create.
A dictionary containing property names and their values to set on the created instance.
The service provider used to resolve dependencies for the constructor.

returns.description: An instance of the specified type with properties set.
